positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a stylized mountain range viewed through a circular telescope lens. The foreground features a group of diverse, happy cartoon forest animals (e.g., foxes, raccoons, bears) gathered around a picnic blanket, looking up in awe. The art style should be whimsical vintage lithograph meets modern vector illustration, using a limited, cheerful palette of forest greens, sky blues, burnt orange, and cream. Strong linework and clean color blocking are mandatory. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, ensuring high readability when scaled onto fabric. Minimalist background elements, maximum visual impact, flat colors with selective gradient depth.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, dirty, messy, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, deep shadows, realistic photography, photo-realistic, bokeh, poorly drawn
